docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RESET HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERLACH, CLAIRE
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-01-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-03-2026 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-21-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $831.25 AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, RYAN
DECLARATION RE: SERVICE OF SC-100. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERLACH, CLAIRE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-01-2026 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF CLAIRE GERLACH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RYAN WONG IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GERLACH, CLAIRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, RYAN $5,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $276.00 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,676.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: AS DETAILED BELOW: SECURITY DEPOSIT: PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL, AS REQUESTED, $3,000, IS AWARDED. THE COURT FINDS THAT MANY OF THE ITEMS ON THE DEFENDANT'S LIST THAT WERE OFFERED AS SUPPORT FOR HIS FAILURE TO REIMBURSE THE PLAINTIFF THE $3,000 SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE UNREASONABLE AND UNSUPPORTED BY THE EVIDENCE. MANY OF THE ITEMS WERE RELATED TO NORMAL WEAR AND TEAR THAT OCCURRED OVER THE COURSE OF THE FIVE YEARS OF PLAINTIFF'S RESIDENCE. THE REMAINING ITEMS REFERENCED ON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00 REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT IN DURING THIRD ATTEMPT. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERLACH, CLAIRE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, RYAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY GERLACH, CLAIRE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, RYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION TO RESET HEARING DATE DUE TO LACK OF SERVICE OF THE CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERLACH, CLAIRE
TRIAL RESET TO APR-03-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-03-2026 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
